title: Require Recipe Stage Authoring File Shape
forbids: standard recipe stage root files that are not the authoring owner shape: createStage must be present, imports must be from stage rails, standard public-config rails, or domain model/artifact surfaces, and operation contract internals must not be mirrored into stage authoring
why: A recipe stage root index.ts is the authoring surface for createStage and step selection. Shared standard-recipe public-config modules may own family-level schema and compile helpers when several stages consume the same authoring rail; domain modules provide reusable model schemas, model policy, artifact contracts, and public domain surfaces. Stage-local public-config, knobs, and binding helper files remain topology residue, not extra authority.
remediate: Keep createStage and step selection in the owning stage index.ts, move genuinely shared standard recipe schema/compile helpers to root public-config rails, move reusable domain primitives to domain model/schemas or model/policy, and stop mirroring operation input/output/config/strategy members in stage authoring.
message: Stage root index.ts must be the positive authoring owner shape.
